ChatTypingInfo_menus_info_enabled_desc: Choose if info text should be active while in a pre-game lobby and on the briefing screen.
ChatTypingInfo_menus_alpha_desc: Adjust how opaque the info text should be.
ChatTypingInfo_menus_use_alignment_prese: While enabled, info text position and font are adjusted by ChatInfo automatically. Disable this option to adjust the text manually, in case your chat window adjusting mods are not supported by ChatInfo. Supported options: Vanilla Payday 2.
ChatTypingInfo_menus_alignment_w_desc: Adjust how wide the info text panel should be (in pixels). If selected value is too small, the text will try to wrap words bellow, onto the next line.
ChatTypingInfo_menus_alignment_h_desc: Adjust how tall the info text panel should be (in pixels). If value is too small, text will become invisible.
ChatTypingInfo_menus_alignment_x_desc: Adjust how far from the top of your screen the info text panel should be (in pixels).
ChatTypingInfo_menus_alignment_y_desc: Adjust how far from the left side of your screen the info text panel should be (in pixels).
ChatTypingInfo_menus_font_size_desc: Adjust info text panel font size.
ChatTypingInfo_in_game_info_enabled_desc: Choose if info text should be active while in a heist.
ChatTypingInfo_in_game_alpha_desc: Adjust how opaque the info text should be.
ChatTypingInfo_in_game_use_alignment_pre: While enabled, info text position and font are adjusted by ChatInfo automatically. Disable this option to adjust the text manually, in case your chat window adjusting mods are not supported by ChatInfo. Supported options: Vanilla Payday 2, VHUD+, Void UI.
ChatTypingInfo_in_game_alignment_w_desc: Adjust how wide the info text panel should be (in pixels). If selected value is too small, the text will try to wrap words bellow, onto the next line.
ChatTypingInfo_in_game_alignment_h_desc: Adjust how tall the info text panel should be (in pixels). If value is too small, text will become invisible.
ChatTypingInfo_in_game_alignment_x_desc: Adjust how far from the top of your screen the info text panel should be (in pixels).
ChatTypingInfo_in_game_alignment_y_desc: Adjust how far from the left side of your screen the info text panel should be (in pixels).
ChatTypingInfo_in_game_font_size_desc: Adjust info text panel font size.
